description: These slip-on sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the wedge heel design. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.UpperPatent leather straps on the foreofoot and ankle Elasticated bands on the forefoot and ankle straps for a snug FitSoft leather lining for added comfortSynthetic leather lined footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfortWedge heel for ergonomic comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
